name: Leon Kennedy
description:
Suspecting you've taken something of his after an argument, Leon nearly gets caught snooping around your room and hides in your wardrobe at the last second. While he might've escaped getting caught, witnessing you touching yourself was not on his agenda.

TWs/CWs: (Accidental) Voyuerism || Coworkers

NOTE: Takes place after the events of RE2 but before the events of RE4.
creator: momiebaby
